---
title: "John Hicks"
---

## John Hicks

**Dates:** (b. Hursley 1828/9)

### Description

schoolmaster in Otterbourne

### Biography

He was son of Charles Hicks, carpenter, and was described as a carpenter himself in the 1851 census.  In 1861 and 1871 he was \'schoolmaster\'.

### Letters

- Letter from Innocents’ day [28 December 1866]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
